reason: Verified that the SuperAgent can execute browser operations and successfully retrieve page titles from web pages
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with list of agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260428-180009-c465" in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface and configuration panel
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the message input field — Message was entered correctly in the textbox
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed work in 7 seconds and returned response

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is 'Example Domain'." with visible green checkmarks on both tool calls (Open Browser and Browser Command), and browser preview shows the actual Example Domain page content
